# coolify_deployments (Data Source)

Lists deployments. Optionally filter by application UUID.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# List all deployments
data "coolify_deployments" "all" {}

output "all_deployment_uuids" {
  value = [for d in data.coolify_deployments.all.deployments : d.uuid]
}

# List deployments for a specific application
data "coolify_deployments" "app" {
  application_uuid = "your-app-uuid"
}

output "app_deployment_statuses" {
  value = [for d in data.coolify_deployments.app.deployments : d.status]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `application_uuid` (String) The UUID of the application to filter deployments by. If not set, all deployments are returned.
- `filter` (Block Set) Filter results by field values. Multiple filters are ANDed together. Multiple values within a filter are ORed. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--filter))

### Read-Only

- `deployments` (Attributes List) The list of deployments. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--deployments))

<a id="nestedblock--filter"></a>
### Nested Schema for `filter`

Required:

- `name` (String) The field name to filter by.
- `values` (Set of String) The values to match against. Multiple values are ORed.


<a id="nestedatt--deployments"></a>
### Nested Schema for `deployments`

Read-Only:

- `server_uuid` (String) The UUID of the server the deployment ran on.
- `status` (String) The current status of the deployment.
- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the deployment.
